{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Dragon-turtle
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]]
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[dragon]]-turtle is in human form and is contract-bound to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
